title: fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/buildkit to v0.26.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/moby/buildkit](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit) | `v0.25.2` -> `v0.26.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.26.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.25.2/v0.26.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>moby/buildkit (github.com/moby/buildkit)</summary>

### [`v0.26.0`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.26.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/compare/v0.25.2...v0.26.0)

buildkit 0.26.0

Welcome to the v0.26.0 release of buildkit!

Please try out the release binaries and report any issues at
<https://github.com/moby/buildkit/issues>.

##### Contributors

- Tõnis Tiigi
- CrazyMax
- Akihiro Suda
- Sebastiaan van Stijn
- Jonathan A. Sternberg
- Brian Goff
- Dawei Wei
- Alberto Garcia Hierro
- Damon Holden
- David Karlsson
- Justin Chadwell
- Mikhail Dmitrichenko
- bpascard

##### Notable Changes

- Change how file checksum is calculated when wildcards and include/exclude patterns are involved to better align with how they are calculated in the non-wildcard path. [#​6238](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6238)
- LLB Copy operation now allows specifying required paths to be included in the copy. [#​6229](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6229)
- Fixed race condition between cache and snapshot for the Git source. [#​6281](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6281)
- Fixed race condition in HTTP cache key digest computation that could cause duplicate requests and digest mismatch errors. [#​6292](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6292)
- Runc container runtime has been updated to v1.3.3. [#​6331](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6331)
- Source metadata requests via `ResolveSourceMeta`, previously available for image sources, can now be performed for Git sources. This can be used to resolve Git commit and tag checksums and also to access the raw commit and tag objects for further verification. [#​6283](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6283)
- Source metadata requests via `ResolveSourceMeta`, previously available for image sources, can now be performed for HTTP sources. This can be used to access artifact checksums, last-modified time etc. [#​6285](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6285)
- Git sources can now perform verification of GPG or SSH signatures on commits and tags. Enable git signature checks via source policy. [#​6300](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6300) [#​6344](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6344)
- `contentutil` package now supports moving referrer objects when using `CopyChain` function. [#​6336](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6336)
- Fix fetch by commit for git source when tags change or branch names are updated. [#​6259](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6259)
- Fix http connection leak when resolving metadata from http source on non-2xx HTTP status codes. [#​6313](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6313)
- A new type of source policies has been added that supports making policy decisions on the client side via session tunnel. [#​6276](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6276)
- Add buildkit capability for detecting if source policy decisions can be made via session tunnel. [#​6345](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6345)
- Avoid intermediate type wrappers for custom fields in provenance. [#​6275](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6275)
- Add raw commit/tag object access when resolving git source metadata. [#​6298](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6298)
- Move image source resolver away from the `ResolveImageConfig` type to `ResolveSourceMetadata`. [#​6330](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6330) # probably not needed for changelog
- Fix inline cache used with multiple exporters. [#​6263](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6263)
- Fix handling multiple inline cache exporters configured for single build. [#​6272](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6272)
- Fix handling of annotated Git tags. The pin of the annotated tag should be the SHA of the tag and not the commit it is pointing to. [#​6251](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6251)
- Fix source policy attributes validation when multiple rules use the same identifier. [#​6342](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6342)
